CustomField.description: Check this to enable default interest calculation starting from the Payment Due Date. When enabled, invoices associated with this contract will be marked as overdue on the Payment Due Date. Any updates to setting will apply only to future overdue invoices.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check this to enable default interest calculation starting from the Payment Due Date. When enabled, invoices associated with this contract will be marked as overdue on the Payment Due Date. Any updates to setting will apply only to future overdue invoices.
CustomField.label: Mark Invoice Overdue on Payment Due Date
